case_title: SPECTRUM FEDERAL CREDIT UNION VS DAVIS, ENA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $597.02 FILED BY SPECTRUM FEDERAL CREDIT UNION AS TO DEFENDANT DAVIS, ENA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-12-1996 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SPECTRUM FEDERAL CREDIT UNION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DAVIS, ENA $597.02 PRINCIPAL, $59.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $656.52, DEFT. TO PAY AS FOLLOWS: $328.26 ON 9/23/96 AND $328.26 ON 10/7/96. PARTIES AGREED ON JUDGMENT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
